Issue: missing alt attribute (logo.png). Screen readers cannot describe the image, violating WCAG 1.1.1.
Recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute, e.g. alt="Company logo". If decorative, use alt="" with role="presentation".

Issue: innerHTML assigned with unsanitized user input from location.hash. DOM-based XSS vulnerability.
Recommendation: Use textContent instead of innerHTML, or sanitize input with DOMPurify.

Issue: Missing <meta name="description">. Search engines rely on this for snippet generation.
Recommendation: Add <meta name="description" content="..."> with a concise page summary (120-160 characters).

Issue: Render-blocking external stylesheet loaded synchronously in <head>. Delays FCP.
Recommendation: Inline critical CSS and load remaining stylesheet asynchronously via preload pattern.

Issue: @font-face missing font-display: swap. Custom fonts block text rendering (FOIT).
Recommendation: Add font-display: swap; to the @font-face rule.

Issue: No JSON-LD structured data. Limits rich-result eligibility.
for promo.png missing width and height attributes. Causes CLS.
Recommendation: Add width and height attributes matching the image intrinsic dimensions.

Issue: Inline <script> in <body> without defer/async blocks HTML parsing.
Recommendation: Externalize script and use defer attribute.

Issue: No landmark elements (header, nav, main, footer). Hurts screen reader navigation.
Recommendation: Wrap content in semantic landmark elements.

Issue: Page <title> is generic (Sample Page). Poor for CTR in search results.
Recommendation: Use a specific keyword-rich title (50-60 characters).

Issue: Hardcoded id="card-item" on reusable component. Multiple instances share same id, violating HTML spec and breaking accessibility.
Recommendation: Use React.useId() or accept an id prop. Remove if not needed.

Issue: <div onClick> is not keyboard-accessible. Cannot be triggered via keyboard, violating WCAG 2.1.1.
Recommendation: Use <button> element, or add role="button", tabIndex={0}, and onKeyDown handler.

Issue: document.querySelector used inside React component. Bypasses virtual DOM, causes issues with multiple instances.
Recommendation: Use useRef hook and manage styles via React state or CSS classes.

Issue: console.log left in production code. Clutters console and may leak info.
Recommendation: Remove or replace with conditional debug logger stripped in production.
